headline: 3M Secures Long-Term Airbus A220 Insulation Supply Agreement (MMM)
summary: Partnership Expands Collaboration on Commercial Aircraft Programme3M (NYSE:MMM) has signed a long-term agreement with Airbus (EU:AIR) to provide thermal and acoustic insulation materials for the Airbus A220 aircraft programme. The deal strengthens the existing relationship between the two companies and positions 3M as a key supplier of advanced insulation technologies for one of Airbus’s fastest-growing commercial aircraft platforms.

headline: 3M and Airbus announce agreement to advance A220 passenger comfort and aircraft performance through advanced insulation technology
summary: 3M and Airbus, a leading aircraft manufacturer, have signed a long-term supply agreement to help drive the continued advancement of passenger comfort and aircraft performance on the Airbus A220. The agreement underscores both companies' commitment to innovation in aircraft design and passenger experience.
